_meta.description: Corporate spotlight: speaker on camera intercut with b-roll. Based on Livitum Diseñadora project (v11). Includes split-screen reveal intro, continuous VO, animated LowerThird, EndCard with social proof.

sections.name: hook
sections.notes: B-roll with VO starting. Optional: split-screen before/after reveal overlay.

sections.name: presentation
sections.notes: Speaker on camera. LowerThird appears with name+role. VO continues.

sections.name: showcase
sections.notes: Alternating b-roll clips with speaker VO continuing (J-cut). Audio is ONE continuous take from bruto.

sections.name: cta
sections.notes: Speaker on camera, CTA message. Hold final word 1s before EndCard.

sections.name: endcard
sections.notes: Remotion animation: brand logo + social proof (Trustpilot/reviews).

clips.notes: First b-roll clip. Use green-tagged clips if available. VO starts over this.
Speaker on camera. Face-centered vertical crop. LowerThird overlaid. Cut AFTER last word of intro, visual cut to b-roll while VO continues.
B-roll with VO continuing from speaker. Audio is CONTINUOUS — no cut between presentation and showcase.
Speaker CTA. Same face crop as position 3. Hold 1s after last word.
Remotion animation: logo + social proof. Render with remotion-render.sh.

segments.notes: ONE continuous audio take covering hook through showcase. Cut at word boundaries using word_timestamps=True.
CTA audio segment. Separate take from the showcase section.

audio.notes: Add 30ms fade-in to first segment to remove any word bleed from previous phrase.

music.notes: Music at 10% under VO. Slightly louder on EndCard (no VO).

lowerthird.notes: Use drawtext, NOT Remotion+colorkey. Slide-in 0.4s, slide-out 0.3s.

split_screen_reveal.notes: If enabled: split-screen with wipe reveal. Top image expands to cover bottom. Use Remotion for the wipe animation, Python cv2 for the expansion compositing.

endcard_remotion.notes: Render with remotion-render.sh. Use real logo PNG, never recreate.

subtitles.notes: Transcribe the ASSEMBLED video, not the bruto. FontSize=10-12 for 1080x1920. Always test on a real frame before burning.
